summary: BC Reference Cache Layer fully tested. All 17 backend API tests pass. Cache contains 277,979 records across 5 entity types. Frontend correctly shows 'Cache (local)' in Reference Intelligence debug panel. All cache endpoints working: status, sync, search, resolve.
critical_code_review_comments: BCReferenceCacheService properly initialized with 277,979 records across 5 entity types
Cache-first resolution working: resolver checks cache before BC API fallback
Background sync running every 10 minutes as configured
Events bc.cache.initialized and bc.cache.sync.completed are emitted correctly
Frontend ReferenceIntelligencePanel shows 'Cache (local)' in debug panel when cache is used
Cache search returns all matching entity types for a reference (PO, SO, shipment for 111216)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test document a1dec76a-17a2-46d4-a9f9-a0f6fb818208 with PO 110463
context_for_next_testing_agent: BC Reference Cache Layer fully tested. Cache endpoints: GET /api/cache/status (shows healthy with ~277K records), POST /api/cache/sync?mode=incremental (triggers background sync), GET /api/cache/search?reference=X (searches cache). Cache-first resolution: POST /api/bc/resolve-reference returns source=cache in bc_record_info when found in cache. Frontend shows 'Cache (local)' in green in the Resolver Debug panel when cache is used. Test reference 111216 has 3 matches: purchase_order, sales_order, posted_sales_shipment.

cache_status_endpoint.evidence: GET /api/cache/status returns status=healthy, total_records=277979, entity_counts with 5 types, background_sync_active=true

cache_sync_endpoint.evidence: POST /api/cache/sync?mode=incremental triggers background sync, returns status=sync_started

cache_search_endpoint.evidence: GET /api/cache/search?reference=111216 returns 3 matches: purchase_order, sales_order, posted_sales_shipment

resolve_intelligence_uses_cache.evidence: POST /api/documents/{id}/resolve-intelligence shows cache as data source in best_match.bc_record_info

frontend_shows_cache_source.evidence: Resolver Debug panel shows 'Data Source: Cache (local)' in green text

cache_fallback_to_api.evidence: Obscure reference OBSCURE_TEST_REF_XYZ123 returns not_found after checking API tables

event_bc_cache_initialized.evidence: bc.cache.initialized events found in recent events API

event_bc_cache_sync_completed.evidence: bc.cache.sync.completed events found with total_records payload

mocked_apis.note: All BC API calls are REAL against Production BC. Cache is populated from real BC data.
